archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) modified to strict Black & Blue constraint

cards.classes: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 hover:border-blue-500/40 shadow-sm hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(30,144,255,0.15)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl

inputs.classes: bg-transparent border border-white/20 focus:border-[#1E90FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#1E90FF] text-white rounded-md

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E90FF] hover:bg-[#2A8BFF] text-white font-semibold rounded-none tracking-wide px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 border border-[#1E90FF]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent hover:bg-white/5 border border-white/20 text-white font-medium rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-colors

hero_background.description: Abstract blue and white lines on black background
hero_background.usage: Landing page hero section background (overlay with bg-black/60)

features_trading.usage: Features section visual for PC bot representation

mobile_mockup.usage: Mobile EA preview section mockup frame background

header.style: Crystal Glass backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50

hero_section.headline: Host Your PC Bot as Mobile EA
hero_section.subheadline: Your bot trades, clients copy from their phones. No VPS needed for clients.

auth_pages.layout: Split screen. Left: dark branded abstract art. Right: strict functional forms.

client_mobile_preview.layout: Center column representing mobile frame. Deep black with blue data highlights showing mock trades.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Pure black backgrounds (#000000 or #050505) and #1E90FF electric blue only. No purples, greens, or oranges.
Ensure all buttons, form inputs, and interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Use standard pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing sections for deep layout control, but use customized Shadcn UI components for complex interactions like Modals, Selects, and Forms.
Implement the font stack correctly: Outfit for Headings and IBM Plex Mono for Body to give it a 'trading terminal' vibe.
In the mentor dashboard, use recharts or Shadcn chart components customized with the #1E90FF stroke on pure black.
Ensure the hero image has a heavy black overlay (bg-black/60 or more) to ensure perfect text readability.
